message.content:
The archive is empty. There are no items in the archive to describe.  

Text elements:  
- Top left: "Vault v.01"  
- Top right: "v.01 • READY"  
- Center: "The archive is empty"  
- Below center: "Saved videos and audio will appear here, with thumbnails and trim details intact."  
- Bottom bar (left to right): "N", "VAULT", "ARCHIVE", "TUNE"  

Visual elements:  
- A trash can icon (centered above "The archive is empty")  
- A dark gradient background (black to dark brown)  
- Bottom navigation bar with icons/text for "VAULT", "ARCHIVE", and "TUNE" (the "ARCHIVE" tab is highlighted in brown)
